creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #22)
> It seems the difference between your build and jrm's and mine is
> that you are building using GCC while we are using clang.

Wow, wow, wow! Are you saying the problem is that clang is used and
should use GCC-specific headers?

I'd declare this NOTABUG, not a supported (and hardly supportable)
use case. (And also looks like only the tip of an iceberg?)
